narrative:
Licking Township B (precinct in Licking County) has 920 registered voters, with 48.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.7 percentage points.
